mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO biz_outbound_batch_trace ( req_item_id, stock_in_item_id, spare_part_id, deduct_qty, outbound_time ) VALUES
(#{trace.reqItemId}, #{trace.stockInItemId}, #{trace.sparePartId}, #{trace.deductQty}, #{trace.outboundTime})
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.req_item_id as reqItemId, t.stock_in_item_id as stockInItemId, t.spare_part_id as sparePartId, t.deduct_qty as deductQty, t.outbound_time as outboundTime, r.receipt_code as receiptCode, sp.code as sparePartCode FROM biz_outbound_batch_trace t LEFT JOIN stock_in_item si ON t.stock_in_item_id = si.id LEFT JOIN stock_in_receipt r ON si.stock_in_receipt_id = r.id LEFT JOIN spare_part sp ON t.spare_part_id = sp.id WHERE t.req_item_id = #{reqItemId} ORDER BY t.outbound_time DESC

SELECT t.id, t.req_item_id as reqItemId, t.stock_in_item_id as stockInItemId, t.spare_part_id as sparePartId, t.deduct_qty as deductQty, t.outbound_time as outboundTime, req.req_no as batchInfo FROM biz_outbound_batch_trace t LEFT JOIN biz_requisition_item ri ON t.req_item_id = ri.id LEFT JOIN biz_requisition req ON ri.req_id = req.id WHERE t.stock_in_item_id = #{stockInItemId} ORDER BY t.outbound_time DESC
